case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. GAIL MCGASTER

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCGASTER, GAIL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-08-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 CONTINUED TO APR-03-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025512), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC SERVED DEC-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGASTER, GAIL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100034409) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCGASTER, GAIL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-12-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS PRAYER (TRANSACTION ID # 100028298) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-03-2018 CONTINUED TO JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. THE APR-03-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ANGIE C HONG, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-11-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to Sep-11-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Apr-03-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
